---
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: hero-section
![](Constantine.JPG){width="100%"}

### The First Hybrid National Seminar on Bioactive Molecules: From Characterization to Innovative Biotechnological Applications

**November 29–30, 2026**

**National Higher School of Biotechnology (ENSB) – Taoufik Khaznadar**\
**Ali Mendjeli, Constantine, Algeria**

![](ENSB.JPG){width="100%"}

<br>

:::

<br>

The **1st Hybrid National Seminar on Bioactive Molecules: From Characterization to Innovative Biotechnological Applications (NSBM26)** is organized by the **Concept and Application of Bioactive Molecules (CAMBio) Laboratory** in partnership with the **National Higher School of Biotechnology (ENSB)**.

Held in **hybrid format**, NSBM26 will bring together researchers, academics, doctoral students, and industry professionals to showcase the latest advances in bioactive molecules and their biotechnological applications through keynote lectures, oral and poster presentations, and high-level scientific discussions.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Seminar Objectives

Bioactive molecules play a central role in modern scientific innovation by connecting natural resources with solutions that improve human health, agriculture, energy production, and environmental sustainability.

The seminar aims to:

- promote the valorization of natural bioresources;
- encourage innovation in biotechnology;
- strengthen collaboration between academia and industry;
- showcase recent scientific advances;
- foster interdisciplinary research addressing national and global challenges.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Scientific Themes

:::::::: grid
::: g-col-lg-4
### 🩺 Topic 1

**Pharmacology of Bioactive Molecules and Human Health**
:::

::: g-col-lg-4
### 🌱 Topic 2

**Bioactive Molecules for Food Security and Agro-Industry**
:::

::: g-col-lg-4
### 🔬 Topic 3

**Microbial Biotechnologies and Energy Security**
:::

::: g-col-lg-6
### 🌍 Topic 4

**Environmental Valorization and Preservation**
:::

::: g-col-lg-6
### 🤖 Topic 5

**Digital Innovation and Artificial Intelligence in Biotechnology**
:::
::::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|:-----------------------------|:-------------------------|
| Call for Abstracts Opens | June 30, 2026 |
| Abstract Submission Deadline | September 30, 2026 |
| Notification of Acceptance | November 15, 2026 |
| Seminar | **November 29–30, 2026** |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Organized by

- **Concept and Application of Bioactive Molecules (CAMBio) Laboratory**
- **National Higher School of Biotechnology (ENSB)**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contact

**Email**

nsbm@ensbiotech.edu.dz

**Phone**

+213 5 50 84 74 87

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {.callout-important collapse="false"}
## Join us in Constantine!

Be part of the first national scientific event dedicated to bioactive molecules and innovative biotechnological applications.

**Molecules Shaping Bio-innovation**
:::
